Simple Muslim prayer tracker

Log your Salah with calm, clarity, and privacy.

Salah Logbook helps Muslims track the five daily prayers, see what was prayed or missed, review analytics, and receive gentle reminders — without ads, social pressure, or unnecessary accounts.

✓ Local-first prayer history✓ City-based prayer times✓ No ads or selling data

Built for daily consistency.

The MVP focuses on one job: making it easy to log the five prayers and understand your consistency over time.

✓

One-tap prayer logging

Track Fajr, Dhuhr, Asr, Maghrib, and Isha with a simple prayed or missed flow.

▦

Helpful analytics

View current streak, longest streak, completion rate, on-time rate, and consistency by prayer.

◷

Prayer time reminders

Use downloaded city prayer times and local notifications to remind you when it is time to log Salah.

⌂

City prayer times

Download and cache a full year of prayer times for your selected city, including calculation method options.

☾

Arabic prayer names

Choose whether to show Arabic script beside prayer names for a more familiar experience.

●

Personal appearance

Select an accent color such as Emerald, Teal, or Pine to make the app feel personal.

App Store deployment details.

App name

Salah Logbook — a clear, calm, searchable name for a personal Salah tracker.

Subtitle

Simple Salah tracker

Description

Track your five daily prayers, review your consistency, and keep your prayer history private on your iPhone.

Privacy Policy

Effective date: 14 June 2026

Salah Logbook is designed to be private and local-first. We do not sell your personal data, show ads, or create public profiles.

Information the app uses

  • Prayer logs you create inside the app.
  • Your selected city, country, calculation method, and Asr calculation school.
  • Notification preferences and appearance settings.

Prayer times

The app may download prayer times for your selected city from a prayer-times provider and cache them on your device. This is used only to show prayer times and schedule reminders.

Notifications

If you enable notifications, Salah Logbook schedules local reminders on your device. You can disable notifications in the app or iOS Settings.

Data storage

Your prayer logs and preferences are stored on your device using local iOS storage. The MVP does not require an account or backend server.

Data deletion

You can delete or reset app data from within the app or by deleting the app from your device.

Contact

For privacy questions, contact: support@salahlogbook.app

Terms & Conditions

Effective date: 14 June 2026

By using Salah Logbook, you agree to these terms. If you do not agree, please do not use the app.

Purpose of the app

Salah Logbook is a personal prayer logging and reminder tool. It is provided for convenience and personal reflection.

Prayer time accuracy

Prayer times are calculated estimates based on your selected city and settings. You are responsible for confirming prayer times with your local mosque, scholar, or trusted authority when accuracy is important.

No religious ruling

The app does not provide religious rulings, fatwas, or scholarly advice.

Acceptable use

Use the app lawfully and respectfully. Do not attempt to misuse, reverse engineer, or disrupt the app.

Limitation of liability

The app is provided as-is. We are not liable for missed reminders, inaccurate settings, device issues, or decisions made based on app data.

Changes

We may update these terms as the app improves. Continued use means you accept the updated terms.

Support

Need help with Salah Logbook, prayer time settings, notifications, or App Store questions?

Email: owaesmirza@gmail.com
